trustBatch._comment: Trust badges section used in app/components/TrustBatch.tsx
trustBatch.title: Care you can trust for Hajj & Umrah
trustBatch.description: From Ihram-safe formulas to halal-certified standards, Sai brings together everything you need for comfortable, confident personal care throughout your pilgrimage, backed by German Care's strict standards of manufacturing precision.

items.label: Alcohol & Fragrance-Free
items.description: Formulated without alcohol or added perfumes. Gentle on skin and suitable for Ihram, prayer, and sensitive routines during pilgrimage.

hover.label: Cruelty-Free
hover.description: Never tested on animals. Ethically made with compassion at every stage of production and care.

items.label: Vegan
items.description: Crafted without animal-derived ingredients for conscious care. A thoughtful choice for everyday comfort on your Hajj and Umrah journey.

hover.label: Dermatologically Tested
hover.description: Rigorously tested under dermatological supervision. Gentle, effective formulas suited for daily pilgrimage use.

items.label: Halal
items.description: Developed in line with halal principles and trusted standards. Gives you reliable, worry-free personal care throughout your sacred journey.

hover.label: Travel-Friendly
hover.description: Compact, reliable, and easy to pack. Perfect companions for long flights, hotels, and life on the move.

items.label: Ihram-Safe
items.description: Designed to meet Ihram requirements at every step of pilgrimage. Stay comfortable and confident from travel to daily sacred rituals.

hover.label: Hot Climate Conditions
hover.description: Made to perform in heat and humidity. Keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable in demanding climates.

products.title: Our Products Sai Kit by German Care
products.description: Discover our premium formulas designed specifically for your sacred journey. Every product delivers the comfort, protection, and confidence you need to focus entirely on your pilgrimage.

kit.name: Hajj & Umrah Personal Care Kit
kit.description: Everything you need for Hajj and Umrah in one kit. Anti-chafing cream for long walks in Ihram, a fragrance-free deodorant for daily freshness, SPF 50+ sunblock for the intense sun, and a gentle shampoo to refresh after hot, tiring days of travel.
kit.imageAlt: Hajj & Umrah Personal Care Kit view {index}

keyBenefits: Complete Hajj and Umrah care in one travel-ready kit
All products are fragrance-free and Ihram-safe
Designed for long walking, heat, and daily freshness
Made in Germany with dermatologically tested formulas
details.howToUse: Use each product as directed on its packaging throughout your pilgrimage. Apply sunblock before outdoor rituals, use anti-chafing cream before long walks, refresh with deodorant and shampoo daily as needed.

ingredients.name: Daily Use Shampoo – Fragrance-Free
ingredients.list: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Maris Sal, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, Sodium Benzoate, Coco-Glucoside, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Xylitol, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Glucose, Hydrogenated Vegetable Glycerides Citrate, Tocopherol, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate.

ingredients.name: Deodorant Roller – Fragrance-Free
ingredients.list: Aqua, Pentylene Glycol, Distarch Phosphate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cyclodextrin, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Caproyl/Lauroyl Lactylate, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Caprylate, Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Ascorbyl Isostearate, Isostearic Acid, Ascorbic Acid.

ingredients.name: Sunblock SPF 50+ with Hyaluronic Acid
ingredients.list: Aqua, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Dibutyl Adipate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Diisopropyl Sebacate, Glycerin, Olus Oil, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Pentylene Glycol, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Phenylbenzimidazole Sulfonic Acid, Tapioca Starch, Diethylhexyl Butamido Triazone, Disodium Phenyl Dibenzimidazole Tetrasulfonate, Arginine, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, 1,2-Heptanediol, Hectorite, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Carrageenan, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Phytate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glucose, Sodium Hyaluronate, Acetyl Glucosamine, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Tremella Fuciformis (Snow Fungus) Sporocarp Extract, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate.

ingredients.name: Anti-Chafing Body Cream
ingredients.list: Aqua, Decyl Cocoate, Dimethicone, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Prunus Amygdalus (Sweet Almond) Dulcis Oil, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Niacinamide, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Lactate, Sodium PCA, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Glycine, Inositol, Lactic Acid, Urea, Tocopheryl Linoleate/Oleate, Citric Acid.

details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Read individual product labels before use. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Suitable for use during Ihram. Store in a cool, dry place while traveling.

items.name: Anti-Chafing Body Cream
items.description: Chafing protection cream for the body designed to reduce friction by forming a soft protective layer, moisturize the skin and help maintain comfort in areas that are prone to rubbing, such as between the thighs and under the arms. Recommended to use while walking or running especially in hot climates and for use during Ihram where long walks and prolonged skin contact may cause skin chafing and inflammation.

details.howToUse: Apply to clean, dry skin on friction-prone areas such as between the thighs and under the arms before walking or running. Especially recommended in hot climates and during Ihram, when long walks and prolonged skin contact may cause chafing and inflammation. Reapply as needed during extended activity.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Decyl Cocoate, Dimethicone, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Prunus Amygdalus (Sweet Almond) Dulcis Oil, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Niacinamide, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Lactate, Sodium PCA, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Glycine, Inositol, Lactic Acid, Urea, Tocopheryl Linoleate/Oleate, Citric Acid.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Store at room temperature. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs.

items.name: Deodorant Roller – Fragrance-Free
items.description: Gentle daily deodorant for long-lasting comfort.

details.howToUse: Apply to clean, dry underarms. Reapply as needed.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Pentylene Glycol, Distarch Phosphate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cyclodextrin, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Caproyl/Lauroyl Lactylate, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Caprylate, Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Ascorbyl Isostearate, Isostearic Acid, Ascorbic Acid.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not apply to broken skin. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Keep out of reach of children.

items.name: Daily Use Shampoo – Fragrance-Free
items.description: Gentle hair and scalp cleansing. A gentle, fragrance-free shampoo designed for daily cleansing of hair and scalp. Ideal for Hajj and Umrah, as it contains no fragrance or essential oils. Suitable for sensitive users and frequent use. Leaves the hair feeling clean and soft.

details.howToUse: Apply to wet hair, massage gently, then rinse thoroughly. Repeat if needed.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Maris Sal, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, Sodium Benzoate, Coco-Glucoside, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Xylitol, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Glucose, Hydrogenated Vegetable Glycerides Citrate, Tocopherol, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Keep out of reach of children. Store at room temperature.

items.name: Sunblock SPF 50+ with Hyaluronic Acid
items.description: UV Protection. Moisturizing, lightweight, and fast absorbing. This formula contains 100% vegan raw materials and does not include any animal-derived ingredients.

details.howToUse: Apply generously before sun exposure and reapply regularly as needed. Using too little product reduces protection.
details.ingredients: Aqua, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Dibutyl Adipate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Diisopropyl Sebacate, Glycerin, Olus Oil, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Pentylene Glycol, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Phenylbenzimidazole Sulfonic Acid, Tapioca Starch, Diethylhexyl Butamido Triazone, Disodium Phenyl Dibenzimidazole Tetrasulfonate, Arginine, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, 1,2-Heptanediol, Hectorite, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Carrageenan, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Phytate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glucose, Sodium Hyaluronate, Acetyl Glucosamine, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Tremella Fuciformis (Snow Fungus) Sporocarp Extract, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Excessive sun exposure is a serious health risk. Protect babies and children from direct sunlight. Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

ourStory._comment: Our Story section used in app/components/OurStory.tsx
ourStory.title: Rooted in German care, built for your absolute confidence — even in hot weather.
ourStory.description: Sai was founded on a simple belief: everyone deserves access to premium personal care and skincare products that are safe, reliable, and thoughtfully developed for everyday needs, especially in hot weather and climates that demand extra care for the skin and body.
learnMoreContent: Through cooperation with German Care and selected German manufacturers, Sai brings together high-quality skincare and personal care solutions inspired by German standards of safety, precision, and quality. From ingredient selection to production and final delivery, every step reflects our commitment to your comfort, confidence, and well-being.

Our products are designed to support daily freshness and comfort in conditions that may cause sweating, friction, dryness, or discomfort — whether during hot weather, travel, long working days, outdoor activities, Hajj, or Umrah.
Our range includes carefully developed everyday personal care products, as well as halal-friendly and halal-certified solutions for customers who value clean, trustworthy, and responsible care.

At Sai, we do not only offer products — we offer peace of mind. Every product is selected and developed with attention to quality, safety, and the trust our customers place in us, helping you feel fresh, comfortable, and confident every day, no matter the weather.

stats.description: Years of German-inspired skincare expertise and innovation.
Customer satisfaction rate across our product range.
Countries where Sai is trusted for daily skincare.
Average rating from verified customer reviews.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Find quick and helpful answers about Sai Brand, our products, shipping, and everything you need to know for a smooth and confident shopping experience.

items.question: Is it alcohol-free?
items.answer: Yes. Every product in the Hajj & Umrah Personal Care Kit is formulated without alcohol for gentle, everyday use during pilgrimage.

items.question: Is it fragrance-free?
items.answer: Yes. The kit is completely fragrance-free with no added perfumes, making it suitable for Ihram, prayer, and sensitive routines.

items.question: Is it suitable for Ihram?
items.answer: Yes. Our formulas are developed to meet Ihram requirements, so you can care for yourself with confidence throughout Hajj and Umrah.

items.question: What is included?
items.answer: The complete kit includes Daily Use Shampoo, Deodorant Roller, Sunblock SPF 50+, and Anti-Chafing Body Cream — everything you need in one set.

items.question: Is it travel-friendly?
items.answer: Yes. The kit is compact, easy to pack, and designed for long journeys, hot climates, and life on the move during pilgrimage.

items.question: Is it made in Germany?
items.answer: Yes. Sai products are made in Germany, reflecting German standards of quality, precision, and care in every formula.

moreItems.question: How can I buy the SAI Hajj & Umrah Care Kit?
moreItems.answer: You can order directly through our website by visiting the Products section and selecting the complete kit. Follow the checkout steps to place your order securely.

moreItems.question: Is the kit available in GCC countries?
moreItems.answer: Yes, the kit is available in GCC countries. Shipping options and delivery times may vary depending on your location.

moreItems.question: Do you offer international shipping?
moreItems.answer: Yes, Sai Brand offers international shipping to selected regions worldwide, depending on availability and logistics coverage.

moreItems.question: Can I order the kit before traveling for Hajj or Umrah?
moreItems.answer: Yes, we recommend ordering ahead of your travel dates to ensure your kit arrives in time for preparation and packing.

moreItems.question: Is the kit available for wholesale or distributors?
moreItems.answer: Yes, wholesale and distribution opportunities are available. Please contact us for volume pricing and partnership details.

moreItems.question: What are the shipping options and delivery times?
moreItems.answer: Shipping options and delivery estimates depend on your location. Standard delivery typically ranges from a few business days to several weeks for international orders.

moreItems.question: Who can I contact for GCC distribution or partnership inquiries?
moreItems.answer: For GCC distribution, wholesale, or partnership inquiries, please contact us at support@saibrand.com or use the Contact Us button on this page.

privacyPolicy._comment: Privacy Policy page used in app/privacy-policy/page.tsx
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy explains how german-care.com collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data when you visit our website, place an order, contact us, subscribe to communications, or use our services.
We process personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation, GDPR, and applicable German data protection laws.

sections.label: Controller
paragraphs: The controller responsible for data processing is: www.german-care.com

sections.label: Personal Data We Process
paragraphs: We may process the following categories of personal data:
items: Identification data: name, billing address, shipping address
Contact data: email address, phone number
Order data: products ordered, order number, purchase date, return data
Payment data: payment status, payment provider reference, transaction confirmation
Communication data: messages, support requests, complaints
Technical data: IP address, browser type, device data, operating system, log files
Cookie and consent data: cookie preferences, consent date, consent status
Marketing data: newsletter subscription, unsubscribe status, campaign interaction

sections.label: Purposes of Processing
paragraphs: We process personal data for the following purposes:
items: To operate and secure our website
To process orders and deliver products
To handle shipping, returns, refunds, complaints, and warranty claims
To comply with tax, accounting, and legal obligations
To prevent fraud, misuse, and security incidents
To improve our website and services
To send marketing communications where permitted by law or consented to by the user

sections.label: Legal Bases
paragraphs: We process personal data on the following legal bases:
items: Contract performance, where processing is necessary to process and deliver an order.
Legal obligation, where we must retain invoices, tax, accounting, or compliance records.
Legitimate interests, where processing is necessary for website security, fraud prevention, customer support, business administration, and legal defense.
Consent, where we use optional cookies, analytics, advertising tools, or newsletters requiring consent.

sections.label: Website Hosting and Server Logs
paragraphs: When you visit our website, our hosting provider may automatically process server log data such as IP address, date and time of access, requested page, browser type, operating system, and referrer URL.
This processing is necessary for website operation, security, error analysis, and abuse prevention.
Hosting provider: DigitalOcean

sections.label: Cookies and Consent
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies.
Strictly necessary cookies are used for website functions such as shopping cart, checkout, security, language selection, and session management.
Optional cookies, including analytics, marketing, tracking, or third-party cookies, are used only where legally permitted and, where required, only after your consent.
EU guidance states that strictly necessary service cookies may not require consent, while tracking, advertising, analytics, and similar cookies may require prior consent and clear information.
sections.consentNote: You may change or withdraw your consent at any time through:

sections.label: Payment Providers
paragraphs: If you place an order, payment data may be processed by payment service providers.
Depending on the selected payment method, this may include:
Payment providers may act as independent controllers for certain processing activities. Their own privacy policies may apply.

sections.label: Shipping Providers
paragraphs: To deliver your order, we share necessary delivery data with shipping service providers, such as:
items: Email address, where needed for tracking
Phone number, where needed for delivery

sections.label: Customer Support
paragraphs: If you contact us, we process the information you provide to respond to your inquiry, resolve issues, document communication, and protect our legal interests.

sections.label: Newsletter and Marketing
paragraphs: If you subscribe to our newsletter, we process your email address and consent data to send marketing communications.
You may unsubscribe at any time by using the unsubscribe link in the email or by contacting us.

sections.label: Analytics and Advertising
paragraphs: We may use analytics or advertising tools only where legally permitted and, where required, only with your prior consent.
Tools may include: Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Google Ads, and Other.
Do not publish this section unless these tools are actually used.

sections.label: Data Retention
paragraphs: We store personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.
Order and invoice data may be retained for statutory tax and accounting periods. Support and communication data may be retained as long as necessary to handle the request and defend legal claims.

sections.label: International Data Transfers
paragraphs: If personal data is transferred outside the European Economic Area, we use appropriate safeguards, such as adequacy decisions, EU Standard Contractual Clauses, or other legally recognized mechanisms.

sections.label: Your Rights
paragraphs: You have the right to:
To exercise your rights, contact us at: info@german-care.com
items: Request deletion of your personal data
Lodge a complaint with a data protection authority

sections.label: Security
paragraphs: We use appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, alteration, or disclosure.

sections.label: Children
paragraphs: Our website is not directed at children. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children without appropriate legal basis or parental consent.

sections.label: Changes to This Privacy Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The current version is always available on this page.

returnsRefunds.title: Returns & Refunds
paragraphs: This Returns & Refunds Policy applies to purchases made through www.german-care.com
This policy does not limit any mandatory statutory consumer rights under German or EU law.

sections.label: Right of Withdrawal for Consumers
paragraphs: If you are a consumer within the meaning of applicable law, you generally have the right to withdraw from an online purchase within fourteen (14) days without giving any reason.

For goods, the withdrawal period generally begins on the day on which you or a third party designated by you receives the goods. EU consumer guidance confirms the 14-day cooling-off period for distance purchases and that, for goods, it usually runs from delivery.

sections.label: How to Withdraw
paragraphs: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us by a clear statement, for example by email info@german-care.com
You may use our Withdrawal Form, but this is not mandatory.

sections.label: Electronic Withdrawal Function
paragraphs: Where legally required, we provide an electronic withdrawal function on our website.

From 19 June 2026, Germany's new § 356a BGB requires businesses that allow consumers to conclude distance contracts through an online user interface to provide an electronic withdrawal function during the withdrawal period.
items: Recommended website button name: Withdraw from Contract

sections.label: Withdrawal Period
paragraphs: To meet the withdrawal deadline, it is sufficient that you send your withdrawal declaration before the withdrawal period expires.

sections.label: Effects of Withdrawal
paragraphs: If you withdraw from the contract, we will refund all payments received from you, including standard delivery costs, except for additional costs resulting from your choice of a delivery method other than the cheapest standard delivery offered by us.
We may withhold the refund until we have received the goods back or until you have provided proof that you have returned the goods, whichever occurs earlier.

sections.label: Return Shipping Costs
paragraphs: Unless we agree otherwise, the customer bears the direct costs of returning the goods when exercising the right of withdrawal, provided that we informed the customer of this before purchase.
EU guidance states that customers may be responsible for return postage during the cooling-off period if the seller informed them of this before purchase.

sections.label: Return Condition
paragraphs: Returned goods should be sent back complete, unused, undamaged, and, where applicable, in the original packaging.

The customer may inspect the goods as they would normally be allowed to do in a physical shop. If the goods are used beyond what is necessary to inspect their nature, characteristics, and functioning, the customer may be responsible for any loss in value.

sections.label: Hygiene and Sealed Cosmetic Products
paragraphs: For health protection and hygiene reasons, the right of withdrawal may be excluded for sealed goods that are not suitable for return if the seal has been removed after delivery.

This may apply to cosmetic and personal care products, including creams, deodorants, shampoos, sun protection products, and personal care kits, where the product seal, hygiene seal, protective wrapping, or safety closure has been opened or removed.
We therefore cannot accept returns of opened, unsealed, used, contaminated, or damaged hygiene-sensitive products, unless the product is defective or mandatory law provides otherwise.

sections.label: Defective, Damaged or Incorrect Products
paragraphs: If you receive a defective, damaged, or incorrect product, please contact us as soon as possible at: info@german-care.com
This does not limit your statutory warranty rights.
items: Photographs of the product and packaging

sections.label: Refund Method
paragraphs: Refunds will be made using the same payment method used for the original transaction unless expressly agreed otherwise.
We do not charge refund fees.

sections.label: Return Address
paragraphs: Please send returns only after contacting us or following the return instructions provided on our website.
Return address: you will receive an email with the address based in your location.

sections.label: Business Customers
paragraphs: The statutory consumer right of withdrawal does not apply to business customers unless expressly agreed in writing.

sections.label: Abuse and Fraud Prevention
paragraphs: We reserve the right to investigate suspicious return activity, repeated misuse, false claims, or fraudulent conduct. This does not limit mandatory consumer rights.

shippingDelivery.title: Shipping & Delivery
paragraphs: This Shipping & Delivery Policy applies to all orders placed through www.german-care.com

sections.label: Shipping Countries
paragraphs: We currently ship to the following countries:
We reserve the right to restrict delivery to certain countries, regions, islands, military addresses, PO boxes, or locations where delivery is not commercially or legally possible.

sections.label: Processing Time
paragraphs: Orders are usually processed within [1–3] business days after receipt of full payment.
Processing times may be longer during public holidays, high-demand periods, product launches, or circumstances outside our control.

sections.label: Delivery Times
paragraphs: Estimated delivery times are:
Delivery times are estimates only and are not guaranteed unless expressly confirmed in writing.

sections.label: Shipping Costs
paragraphs: Shipping costs are shown clearly before checkout and depend on the delivery destination, order value, parcel size, weight, and selected shipping method.
The customer must review and accept the total order amount, including shipping costs, before placing the order.

sections.label: Delivery Address
paragraphs: The customer is responsible for providing a complete and correct delivery address.

If a parcel cannot be delivered because the address was incorrect, incomplete, unavailable, or because the customer refused or failed to accept delivery, we may charge the customer for any additional shipping, return, storage, or re-delivery costs.

sections.label: Delivery Attempts and Unclaimed Parcels
paragraphs: If a parcel is returned to us because it was not collected, refused, or could not be delivered, we may deduct the actual shipping and return costs from any refund, unless mandatory consumer law provides otherwise.
If the customer requests re-delivery, additional shipping costs may apply.

sections.label: Risk of Loss or Damage
paragraphs: For consumers, the risk of accidental loss or damage passes to the customer only when the goods are delivered to the customer or to a person designated by the customer.
For business customers, the risk may pass to the customer when the goods are handed over to the carrier, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

sections.label: Damaged Parcels
paragraphs: If a parcel arrives visibly damaged, the customer should, where possible, document the damage with photographs and inform us immediately at: info@german-care.com
This does not limit the customer's statutory warranty rights.

sections.label: Customs, Import Duties and Taxes
paragraphs: For deliveries outside the European Union, customs duties, import taxes, local VAT, clearance fees, or other charges may apply. These charges are the responsibility of the customer unless expressly stated otherwise.
We are not responsible for delays caused by customs authorities, import checks, or local delivery restrictions.

sections.label: Delivery Restrictions for Cosmetic Products
paragraphs: Some countries may restrict or regulate the import of cosmetic or personal care products. The customer is responsible for ensuring that the ordered products may be imported into the destination country, unless mandatory law provides otherwise.

sections.label: Split Deliveries
paragraphs: We may deliver an order in multiple shipments if this is reasonable for the customer. Additional shipping charges will not apply unless clearly agreed before dispatch.

sections.label: Contact
paragraphs: For shipping questions, please contact: info@german-care.com

termsConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
paragraphs: These Terms & Conditions apply to all orders placed through www.german-care.com and to the use of our online shop.

sections.label: Seller
paragraphs: The seller is: www.german-care.com

sections.label: Scope
paragraphs: These Terms apply to all purchases made through our online shop.
They apply to consumers and business customers unless otherwise stated.
A consumer is a natural person who enters into a transaction for purposes that are predominantly outside their trade, business, or profession.
A business customer is a natural or legal person acting in the course of commercial or professional activity.

sections.label: Products
paragraphs: We sell cosmetic and personal care products, including SAI / German Care products, kits, creams, deodorants, shampoos, sun protection products, and related care items.
Product images are for illustration purposes. Minor differences in packaging, color, label design, or appearance may occur due to production, screen settings, or product updates.

sections.label: Cosmetic Product Notice
paragraphs: Our products are cosmetic and personal care products. They are not medicinal products and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Customers must read the product information, ingredients, usage instructions, and warnings before use.
Do not use a product if you are allergic or sensitive to any ingredient. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and seek medical advice if necessary.

sections.label: Order Process and Contract Formation
paragraphs: By placing an order, the customer submits a binding offer to purchase the selected goods.
A purchase contract is formed when we accept the order by sending an order confirmation, dispatch confirmation, or by shipping the goods.
sections.itemsIntro: We reserve the right to reject orders where:
items: Incorrect pricing or product information was displayed
There is suspicion of fraud, misuse, or unauthorized resale

sections.label: Prices and VAT
paragraphs: All prices are shown in euros.
For consumer orders within Germany and the EU, prices are shown including applicable VAT unless stated otherwise.
Shipping costs, customs duties, import taxes, and additional charges are shown or explained before checkout where applicable.

sections.label: Payment
paragraphs: Available payment methods are displayed at checkout.
Payment must be completed before dispatch unless otherwise agreed.
We may restrict certain payment methods depending on order value, delivery country, fraud risk, or technical availability.

sections.label: Delivery
paragraphs: Delivery is governed by our Shipping & Delivery Policy, which forms part of these Terms.
Delivery dates are estimates unless expressly confirmed as binding.

sections.label: Retention of Title
paragraphs: The goods remain our property until full payment has been received.

sections.label: Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: Consumers generally have a statutory right of withdrawal for online purchases.
Details are provided in our Returns & Refunds Policy and Withdrawal Policy / Withdrawal Form, where available.
The right of withdrawal may be excluded for sealed goods that are not suitable for return for health protection or hygiene reasons if the seal has been removed after delivery.

sections.label: Returns and Refunds
paragraphs: Returns and refunds are governed by our Returns & Refunds Policy.
This does not limit mandatory statutory consumer rights.

sections.label: Warranty Rights
paragraphs: Statutory warranty rights apply.
If goods are defective, damaged, or incorrect, customers should contact us promptly at: info@german-care.com

sections.label: Promotions and Discount Codes
paragraphs: Promotional codes, discounts, bundles, and special offers may be subject to additional conditions, such as expiry dates, minimum order values, product exclusions, usage limits, or country restrictions.
Promotional codes cannot be exchanged for cash unless required by mandatory law.

sections.label: Customer Account
paragraphs: If customer accounts are available, customers are responsible for keeping login details secure.
We may suspend or close accounts in cases of misuse, fraud, security risk, or breach of these Terms.

sections.label: Prohibited Resale and Commercial Use
paragraphs: Unless expressly agreed in writing, products are sold for personal use only.
We reserve the right to reject or cancel orders that appear to be intended for unauthorized resale, parallel export, marketplace arbitrage, or commercial distribution.

sections.label: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content on the website, including product names, brand names, texts, images, logos, designs, graphics, product concepts, and layout, is protected by intellectual property laws.
Use, reproduction, modification, or distribution without prior written permission is prohibited.

sections.label: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: We are liable without limitation for intent, gross negligence, injury to life, body, or health, and liability under mandatory product liability law.
In cases of slight negligence, we are liable only for breach of essential contractual obligations. In such cases, liability is limited to typical and foreseeable damage.
Any further liability is excluded to the extent permitted by law.

sections.label: Force Majeure
paragraphs: We are not liable for delays or failure to perform caused by circumstances outside our reasonable control, including natural disasters, war, terrorism, strikes, pandemics, transport disruptions, customs delays, supply-chain interruptions, energy failures, cyberattacks, governmental measures, or carrier delays.

sections.label: Reviews and User Content
paragraphs: If customers submit reviews, photos, feedback, or other content, they must ensure that the content is lawful, truthful, and does not infringe third-party rights.
We may remove content that is unlawful, misleading, offensive, abusive, or promotional.

sections.label: Online Dispute Resolution and Consumer Arbitration
paragraphs: The European Commission previously provided an online dispute resolution platform for consumer disputes. Please verify the current status and required wording before publishing.
Suggested German-style wording: We are not obliged and not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.label: Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods, where legally permissible.
For consumers, mandatory consumer protection laws of the country in which the consumer has their habitual residence remain unaffected.

sections.label: Severability
paragraphs: If any provision of these Terms is invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain valid.

sections.label: Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. The version applicable at the time of the order applies.

withdrawalPolicy.title: Withdrawal Policy
paragraphs: This Withdrawal Policy applies to consumer purchases made through www.german-care.com
This policy applies only to consumers. A consumer is a natural person who enters into a legal transaction for purposes that are predominantly outside their trade, business, or profession.

sections.label: Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: Consumers generally have the right to withdraw from a distance contract within fourteen (14) days without giving any reason.
The withdrawal period is fourteen (14) days from the day on which you, or a third party designated by you other than the carrier, take possession of the goods.

For an order delivered in several partial shipments, the withdrawal period begins on the day on which you, or a third party designated by you other than the carrier, take possession of the last goods.

EU consumer rules confirm that consumers can generally withdraw from distance purchases within 14 days from delivery, subject to certain exceptions. If the consumer is not properly informed about the withdrawal right, the withdrawal period may be extended.

sections.label: How to Exercise the Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us of your decision to withdraw from the contract by a clear statement, for example by email or letter.
Please send your withdrawal notice to: info@german-care.com
You may use the model withdrawal form below, but this is not mandatory.
To meet the withdrawal deadline, it is sufficient that you send your withdrawal notice before the withdrawal period expires.

sections.label: Effects of Withdrawal
paragraphs: If you withdraw from the contract, we will reimburse all payments received from you, including the standard delivery costs, without undue delay and no later than fourteen (14) days from the day on which we receive your withdrawal notice.
This does not apply to additional delivery costs resulting from your choice of a delivery method other than the least expensive standard delivery offered by us.
We will use the same payment method for the refund that you used for the original transaction, unless expressly agreed otherwise. You will not be charged any refund fees.
We may withhold reimbursement until we have received the goods back or until you have provided evidence that you have returned the goods, whichever occurs earlier.

sections.label: Return of Goods
paragraphs: You must return or hand over the goods to us without undue delay and no later than fourteen (14) days from the day on which you informed us of your withdrawal.
The deadline is met if you send the goods before the fourteen (14) day period expires.
Return address: will be sent by email.

sections.label: Return Shipping Costs
paragraphs: You bear the direct cost of returning the goods, unless we have agreed otherwise or unless mandatory law provides otherwise.

sections.label: Loss of Value
paragraphs: You are only liable for any diminished value of the goods resulting from handling the goods beyond what is necessary to establish their nature, characteristics, and functioning.

This means you may inspect the products in a way comparable to checking them in a physical shop. However, excessive use, damage, contamination, removal of hygiene seals, or use beyond inspection may reduce or exclude the refund amount, subject to applicable law.

sections.label: Exclusion of Withdrawal for Hygiene-Sealed Goods
paragraphs: The right of withdrawal does not apply to sealed goods that are not suitable for return for reasons of health protection or hygiene if their seal has been removed after delivery.
This may apply to cosmetic and personal care products, including but not limited to:

For hygiene and health protection reasons, we cannot accept returns of products that have been opened, unsealed, used, contaminated, damaged, or where the hygiene seal, safety seal, protective wrapping, or tamper-evident closure has been removed after delivery.
This exclusion is based on the German Civil Code rules for sealed goods that are unsuitable for return for health protection or hygiene reasons once unsealed after delivery.
items: products with hygiene seals, safety seals, protective wrapping, or tamper-evident closures

sections.label: Defective or Incorrect Products
paragraphs: The exclusion for opened hygiene-sensitive products does not affect your statutory rights if the product is defective, damaged, or incorrectly delivered.
If you receive a defective, damaged, or incorrect product, please contact us as soon as possible at: info@german-care.com
items: a short description of the issue
photos of the product and packaging

sections.label: No Withdrawal Right for Business Customers
paragraphs: The statutory consumer right of withdrawal does not apply to business customers, resellers, distributors, or customers acting in the course of trade, business, or professional activity.

sections.label: Electronic Withdrawal Function
paragraphs: Where legally required, we provide an electronic withdrawal function on our website.

From 19 June 2026, Germany introduces a new electronic withdrawal function requirement under § 356a BGB for certain online B2C distance contracts concluded through an online user interface. Businesses should make sure the withdrawal function is clearly accessible during the withdrawal period.
items: Recommended button wording: Withdraw from Contract

sections.label: Model Withdrawal Form
paragraphs: You may use the following form, but it is not mandatory.
formLines: I/we hereby withdraw from the contract concluded by me/us for the purchase of the following goods:
Signature of consumer(s), only if submitted on paper:

sections.label: EU Online Dispute Resolution / Consumer Dispute Resolution
paragraphs: The European Commission previously provided an online dispute resolution platform for consumer disputes. Please verify the current required wording before publication.
We are not obliged and not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.label: Liability for Content
paragraphs: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under the general laws. However, we are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general law remain unaffected. Liability in this respect is only possible from the time we become aware of a specific legal infringement. Upon becoming aware of such infringements, we will remove the relevant content without undue delay.

sections.label: Liability for Links
paragraphs: Our website may contain links to external third-party websites. We have no influence over the current or future content of those external websites. Therefore, we cannot accept liability for external content.
The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content. If we become aware of any legal infringement, we will remove such links without undue delay.

sections.label: Copyright
paragraphs: The content, texts, images, product photos, graphics, design, logos, product names, and other materials published on this website are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.
Any reproduction, editing, distribution, storage, or use beyond the limits of copyright law requires prior written consent from the respective rights holder.

sections.label: Product and Brand Notice
paragraphs: SAI and German Care product names, packaging designs, product images, descriptions, and related brand elements are used for the presentation and sale of personal care and cosmetic products.

All product information is provided with care. However, product packaging, design, ingredients, sizes, or descriptions may be updated from time to time. Customers should always read the information provided on the product packaging before use.
